summary: The pnpm audit command found 1 moderate severity vulnerability in project dependencies, causing the CI job to exit with code 1.
root_cause: A moderate severity vulnerability was detected in the project's dependencies during the pnpm audit check

evidence.reason: Explicit indication that the audit tool discovered vulnerabilities in dependencies
Indicates the severity level of the detected vulnerability
GitHub Actions error marker showing the job failed because pnpm audit exited with a non-zero code when vulnerabilities were detected

suggested_fix: Review the detected moderate severity vulnerability in the dependency audit output and either update the affected dependency to a patched version or document a valid exception if the vulnerability does not apply to the project

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
